ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-29-2009 Set For Order To Show Cause On May-19-09 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of A Minor.
Off Calendar Apr-14-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. Frank Drago, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Daniel Martinez De La Vega, Esq. appeared with petitioner Delia Barnes, who was present as Guardian ad litem for the minor Shedrick Ferguson, who was also present at today's hearing.
Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor was not filed by petitioner's counsel until today, April 14, 2009.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Settlement Amount - $5,500.00
Attorney's Fees* - $1,375.00.
Medical Expenses - $483.43.

A net balance of $3,641.57 shall be deposited into a blocked account with Bank of America. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order, or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Counsel for petitioner shall submit proposed orders to the Court no later than 5:00 p.m. on Wednesday, April 15, 2009.

*The Court refused to approve counsel's initial request for 40% in attorney's fees.
